meta.title: The F-117 was NOT a stealth fighter
meta.description:
The F-117 Nighthawk was the world's first operational stealth aircraft, but despite people calling it the stealth "fighter," it was never actually a fighter at all.
#f117 #stealth #stealthfighter #airpower #shorts #lockheed #nighthawks
